info.description: Azgaar's Fantasy Map Generator output: azgaar.github.io/Fantasy-map-generator

states.name: Neutrals
diplomacy: Ania declared a war on its rival Contia
Ania's vassal Shas joined the war on attackers side

notes.name: Merham Volcano
notes.legend: Erupting volcano. Height: 22061 ft.

notes.name: Brasle Hot Springs
notes.legend: A geothermal springs with naturally heated water that provide relaxation and medicinal benefits. Average temperature is 68°F.

notes.name: Bizad Healing Spring
notes.legend: This legendary water source is whispered about in ancient tales and believed to possess mystical properties. The spring emanates crystal-clear water, shimmering with an otherworldly iridescence that sparkles even in the dimmest light.

notes.name: Tirolle — silver mining town
notes.legend: Tirolle is a mining town of 5981 people just nearby the silver mine.

notes.name: Conta Bridge
notes.legend: A stone bridge spans over the Anolo River near Conta.

notes.name: The Superior Tavern
notes.legend: A big and famous roadside tavern. Delicious dry-aged spinach with sparkling wine is served here.

notes.name: Methass'jaz Monster
notes.legend: Whispers say a relic monster of 12 ft long inhabits Methass'jaz Lake. Truth or lie, folks are afraid to fish in the lake.

notes.name: Totrinch Monster
notes.legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 41 ft long.

notes.name: Laundon Monster
notes.legend: Old sailors tell stories of a gigantic sea monster inhabiting these dangerous waters. Rumors say it can be 33 ft long.

notes.name: Pyreazi Warg
notes.legend: Legends speak of a fat Warg who inhabits Pyreazi hills and harasses travelers in the area.

notes.name: Samersbury Forest
notes.legend: A forest sacred to local Angshire Spirits.

notes.name: Newbigham Pinery
notes.legend: A pinery sacred to local Angshire Spirits.

notes.name: Khiz Pinery
notes.legend: A pinery sacred to local Durinn Spirits.

notes.name: Ciampagnamig Apes
notes.legend: A gang of swamp highwaymen.

notes.name: Kenzaningt Hyenas
notes.legend: A gang of forest robbers.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Pirates
notes.legend: Pirate ships have been spotted in these waters.

notes.name: Caustoketer Column
notes.legend:
An ancient column. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
⳥ⳤⲾⲲⳞⳖ ⳠⳖⲾⳤⳫⳘⳬ Ⳝ ⳜⳬⳫⳲⳖⳫⳤⳌ⳾ⳐⳆⳞⳜⳈ Ⳓ ⳀⲲⳞⲾⳂⲶⳈⳆ⳾ⳤ⳾ⳀⳫⲸⳐⳞⳠ⳧⳧ⳭⳄⳜⳚⳂⳈⳞⳞⳠ ⳃⲶⳂ⳹⳹ⳲⳆ

notes.name: Haton Effigy
notes.legend:
An ancient effigy. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
⳥ ⳬ⳾ⳞⳖⳢⲲ⳾ⳖⳈⳬ⳩Ⳓ⳧ⳔⳖ⳾ⲲⳞⳚ Ⳏ⳩ⳌⳂⲸⳔⲸⳚⲼ ⲺⳎⲼⳞⳁ⳥Ⳬ Ⳮ⳾ⳘⳲⲼⳎⳬⳘⳲⳌ⳧⳹⳾ⳃⳈⳁⲶⳌⳌⳔⲼⳄⳫ⳹⳹ⳊⳔⳆⳎ⳧ⳚⳚ⳾ⳲⳈⳭ⳾ⳬⳃⳭ⳥⳥⳥ⳂⳊⳎⳒ⳩

notes.name: Tunal Megalith
notes.legend:
An ancient megalith. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
༌༰༶༗༤༓༠༇༷༤༴༯༫༗༆༪༂༿༫༌༌༘༛༘༳༴༢༊༢༓༂༨༰༭༆༾༨༒༱༮༯༫༗༁༁༤༪་༸༧༤༃༬༆༊༌༃༗༧༿༜༌༰༓༸༩༨༜༇༖༻༶༅༷༶༈༲༆༻

notes.name: Ruined Fortress
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient fortress. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Sacred site
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient sacred site. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Mausoleum
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient mausoleum. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Redclesbu Archive
notes.legend: A vast collection of knowledge, including many rare and ancient tomes.

notes.name: Travelling Fantastical Circus
notes.legend: Roll up, roll up, this fantastical circus is here for a limited time only.

notes.name: Rothton Tournament
notes.legend: Warriors from around the land gather for a tournament of brutality in Rothton, with fame, fortune and favour on offer to the victor.

notes.name: Ashesterton Fair
notes.legend: A fair is being held in Ashesterton, with all manner of local and foreign goods and services on offer.

notes.name: Minor Jetty
notes.legend: A small location along the Khundindi River to launch boats from sits here, along with a weary looking owner, willing to sell passage along the river.

notes.name: Herons migration
notes.legend: A huge group of herons are migrating, whether part of their annual routine, or something more extraordinary.

notes.name: Geese migration
notes.legend: A huge group of geese are migrating, whether part of their annual routine, or something more extraordinary.

notes.name: Glamzois Fracture
notes.legend: The Glamzois Fracture. Locals claim that it is a good spot to hid treasure.

notes.name: Birtonbuton Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major cities. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Gurulukk Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major cities. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Watonley Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major cities. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Thoubinnes Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major cities. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Helstovil Portal
notes.legend: An element of the magic portal system connecting major cities. The portals were installed centuries ago, but still work fine.

notes.name: Subterranean Rift
notes.legend: A rumoured subterranean rift in this area is causing an emmissary to step through with an all-powerful relic.

notes.name: Disturbed Burial
notes.legend: A burial site has been disturbed in this area, causing the dead to rise and attack the living.

notes.name: Gundab Cemetery
notes.legend: A labyrinthine necropolis where each step echoes with haunting murmurs. The walls are adorned with ancient runes, and restless spirits guide or hinder those who dare to delve into its depths

notes.name: Barbury Necropolis
notes.legend: A foreboding necropolis shrouded in perpetual darkness, where eerie whispers echo through the winding corridors and spectral guardians stand watch over the tombs of long-forgotten souls
